name: Personal Finance OS
next_task: Attorney review of IPS module for RIA trigger risk. LifeOS Core Layer 12 schema must be designed before build starts.
current_focus: Mirror-first financial clarity tool. No investment advice ever. Life-linked goals, values-aligned spending, household privacy architecture.
completion_checks: IPS module reviewed by attorney — no RIA trigger
Past-performance disclosure language approved for any simulation UI
Terms of service financial disclaimer drafted and reviewed
Plaid vs CSV-only decision made for MVP bank connection
LifeOS Core Layer 12 DB schema migrated
anti_drift_notes: NEVER provide personalized investment advice, tax, or legal recommendations. The IPS module is user-authored only — the system reflects the user's own stated policy, never prescribes one. This constraint is non-negotiable and must be architecturally enforced.

decision_debt.description: Attorney review of IPS module required before build
Plaid integration vs CSV-only — live bank connections require NACHA compliance
State-level financial planning law review needed before public launch
